info.title: My API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for my Laravel application

post.description: Create a new user account and return an API token.
Authenticate a user and return an API token.
Revoke all API tokens for the authenticated user.

get.description: Get all items in the authenticated user's cart with total amount.

post.description: Add a product to the cart or update quantity if already exists.

200.description: Added to cart or cart updated

put.description: Update the quantity of a cart item.

delete.description: Remove an item from the cart.

post.description: Checkout the cart, create an order, and clear the cart. Supports COD and QR payment.
Send a contact form message via Telegram. Rate limited to 5 requests per minute.

message.example: I have a question about your products.

get.description: Get paginated list of orders for the authenticated user.
Get a single order with its items.
Returns a paginated list of payments for the authenticated user.
Check if a payment has been submitted for a specific order.
Returns full payment details including order items and user info.

post.description: Upload QR payment proof image for an order. Only works for orders with payment_method = qr.

payment_image.description: Payment proof image (jpg, jpeg, png, max 2MB)

get.description: Get all active products with category (public, paginated).
Get a single product by ID with category (public).
Returns the authenticated user's profile information (aliased route).

put.description: Update the authenticated user's name and email.

get.description: Get paginated reviews for a specific product (public).

post.description: Submit a product review with rating (authenticated).

get.description: Get all products in the authenticated user's wishlist.

post.description: Add a product to the wishlist.

delete.description: Remove a product from the wishlist by product ID.
